industry: JavaScript package management and software supply chain documentation

trends.name: Secure package publishing
trends.gap: Developers increasingly ask how to publish packages with token controls, two-factor authentication, and provenance.
trends.action: Make the secure publishing path easy to find from the main documentation entry point.

trends.name: Dependency risk and audit workflows
trends.gap: AI answers often group dependency auditing with package management, but pages can split those topics across separate sections.
trends.action: Connect install, audit, and remediation guidance in one visible workflow.

trends.name: Team and organization package management
trends.gap: Company users need private package, organization, and permission workflows explained together.
trends.action: Add a team-oriented path that connects organizations, access control, and private packages.

trends.name: Package manager comparisons
trends.gap: AI systems frequently compare npm with Yarn and pnpm when answering broad JavaScript tooling questions.
trends.action: Explain where npm is the default baseline and where alternative tools are commonly considered.
